# Support

## Where to Get Help

| Question | Go here |
|---|---|
| General discussions, agent design questions | [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/discussions) |
| Found a broken link or formatting issue | [Bug Report](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) |
| Want to propose a new agent | [New Agent](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/issues/new?template=new_agent.yml) |
| Want to improve an existing agent | [Improve Agent](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/issues/new?template=improve_agent.yml) |
| Feature ideas | [Feature Request](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) |
| Security vulnerability | Email `contact@riteshrana.engineer` -- **do not open a public issue** |

> **Before opening an issue**, please search [existing issues](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/issues) to avoid duplicates.

## Response Times

This is a solo-maintained project. Expect responses within **2-5 business days** for issues and PRs.

- Issues labeled `good first issue` are actively monitored and mentored.
- Issues labeled `help wanted` are open for community contributions.
- Issues labeled `security` are treated as highest priority.

## Not the Right Place

Please **do not** open issues for:

- General AI/LLM questions (use [Discussions](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/discussions) instead)
- Off-topic questions unrelated to this repository
- Security disclosures (email us privately -- see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))

## What This Project Will Not Do

To keep this sustainable as a solo-maintained project, the following are explicitly out of scope:

- **Hosting or running agents** -- This is a blueprint repository, not a runtime platform
- **Custom agent development** -- Use the templates and existing agents as a starting point
- **Integration with proprietary tools** -- Agents are designed for open, general-purpose use

> If you are unsure whether your request is in scope, start a [Discussion](https://github.com/ambicuity/blueprint-of-agents/discussions) before opening an issue.
